prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为约60名、17名、61名、45名、61名。2022年出现异常低位（17名），可能与当年招生批次调整有关；2023–2025年稳定在45–61名区间，2025年基准位次约61名。近3年波动幅度较小，整体呈平稳态势；该校在黑龙江省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年17人、2022年17人、2023年16人、2024年16人、2025年18人；2026年物理类计划20人，较2025年扩招2人（增幅约11%）。扩招在一定程度上缓解了竞争压力，对最低录取位次有轻微下拉作用（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京大学为985、211、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2021–2026年持续位居全国第2名，是中国最顶尖的综合性大学之一，办学层次和学术声誉极高；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、宿舍管理等一般性事件，但作为全国顶尖学府，此类事件对报考热度影响有限。抖音学校热度排名第3（高热），短视频曝光量和互动量极大，反映考生关注度持续高涨。历史投档异常记录中未见明显断档信号；北京大学拥有A+学科（中国语言文学、法学、数学、物理学、化学、生物学、计算机科学与技术、软件工程、工商管理、应用经济学、哲学、社会学等）30余个，A-及以上学科超过40个，学科实力全国顶尖。招生专业如数学类、计算机类、电子信息类、经济学类、法学等均对应A+/A级学科。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示：计算机类、电子信息/通信为高热推荐；数学/统计、电气工程为推荐；法学、金融/财经/经济为分化观望。北大相关专业多处于高热/推荐状态，对报考有正面推动作用。黑龙江省2026年普通高考总人数约16.7万，较2025年（约17.2万）略有下降，竞争环境总体稳定。；北京大学位于北京市，对黑龙江省考生具有较强跨省吸引力。该校在黑龙江省招生计划占比较小（约15–20人/年），属于典型的外省顶尖高校招生格局，地域偏好对报考热度影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次稳定在45–61名区间、2026年物理类扩招约11%（位次数字增大）、学校顶尖声誉与抖音高热关注度（位次数字减小）等多重因素。扩招带来的竞争缓解与北大持续的高关注度基本相互抵消，预测2026年物理类最低录取位次约65名，区间57–73名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次在57–73名区间，处于全省顶尖水平。建议位次在区间内（约65名左右）的考生以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间（如57名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（数学类、计算机类、元培）；位次接近区间上限（73名左右）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入北大。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 60, 17, 61, 45, and 61 respectively. The abnormally low ranking of 17 in 2022 may be related to adjustments in enrollment batches that year; from 2023 to 2025, rankings stabilized in the 45–61 range, with a baseline ranking of about 61 in 2025. Fluctuations in the past three years have been small, showing an overall stable trend. The university's enrollment plan for Science/Physics Category in Heilongjiang Province: 17 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 18 in 2025. In 2026, the Physics Category plan is 20 students, an increase of 2 students (approximately 11%) compared to 2025. The expansion alleviates competitive pressure to some extent, slightly lowering the minimum admission ranking (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked 2nd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings from 2021 to 2026. It is one of China's top comprehensive universities with extremely high academic level and reputation. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluations are slightly negative, mainly involving general incidents such as campus safety and dormitory management, but as a national top institution, such incidents have limited impact on application enthusiasm. Douyin school popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure and interaction, reflecting sustained high attention from candidates. No obvious discontinuation signals are seen in historical admission anomaly records. Peking University has over 30 A+ disciplines (including Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Business Administration, Applied Economics, Philosophy, Sociology, etc.) and over 40 disciplines rated A- or above, with top national disciplinary strength. Enrollment majors such as Mathematics, Computer Science, Electronic Information, Economics, and Law all correspond to A+/A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication are high-heat recommendations; Mathematics/Statistics, Electrical Engineering are recommended; Law, Finance/Economics are divided and wait-and-see. Related majors at Peking University are mostly in high-heat/recommended status, positively promoting applications. The total number of ordinary college entrance examination candidates in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 167,000, slightly down from about 172,000 in 2025, with a generally stable competitive environment. Peking University is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Heilongjiang candidates. The university's enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province accounts for a small proportion (about 15–20 students per year), typical of top out-of-province university enrollment patterns, with regional preference having a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as historical rankings stabilizing in the 45–61 range, an approximately 11% expansion in Physics Category in 2026 (ranking number increases), the university's top reputation and high Douyin attention (ranking number decreases), the competition relief from expansion and Peking University's sustained high attention largely offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 65, with a range of 57–73.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, etc.)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei) (including Mathematics, Physics, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Guanghua) (including Mathematics)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, etc.)
- Physics (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is in the 57–73 range, at the top level of the province. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within the range (around 65) mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the range (e.g., within 57) can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors (Mathematics, Computer Science, Yuanpei). Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (around 73) are advised to mainly apply for Tier 3 majors to secure admission to Peking University.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 24th, 19th, 2023 liberal arts, 25th, and 23rd respectively. From 2021 to 2025 (available data), rankings stabilized within the 19–25 range, with a baseline ranking of about 23rd in 2025. Overall fluctuation is minimal, showing a highly stable trend. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Heilongjiang Province: 15 students in 2021, 15 in 2022, 15 in 2024, 15 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 15 students, exactly the same as 2025. The enrollment plan has not changed, with no additional impact on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Peking University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranking 2nd nationally in the Soft Science China University Rankings. Its liberal arts strength is particularly outstanding (Chinese Language and Literature A+, Law A+, Sociology A+, Economics A+, etc.), making it the highest academic殿堂 for humanities and social sciences in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluations are slightly negative, but mainly involve general campus management incidents, which have limited impact on the application popularity of top-tier institutions. Douyin school popularity ranking is 3rd (high heat), reflecting extremely high candidate attention. No obvious gaps are seen in historical admission anomaly records. Peking University's liberal arts advantage disciplines are extremely strong: Law A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Sociology A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Philosophy A+, Archaeology A+, Political Science A+, Journalism and Communication A-, etc. Admission majors such as Law, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication all correspond to A+/A-level disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: 2026 major popularity data shows: Law is divided and wait-and-see (popular liberal arts major, fierce competition); Chinese Language/Literature is recommended; Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged; Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see. Peking University's liberal arts majors are overall in a divided state, but the Peking University brand effect makes each major still highly attractive. The total number of candidates for the 2026 ordinary college entrance examination in Heilongjiang Province is about 167,000, with an estimated 53,000 in the history category, slightly decreasing from about 55,000 in 2025. Peking University is located in Beijing, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in Heilongjiang Province. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Heilongjiang Province is stable at 15 students, a typical enrollment scale for top universities in border provinces.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on comprehensive factors such as historical rankings highly stable within the 19–25 range, the 2026 enrollment plan being exactly the same, the university's top reputation and high Douyin attention, etc. The enrollment plan has not changed and historical rankings are extremely stable. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for the history category in 2026 will be about 20th, with a range of 17–23.
